extensions.name: Nvidia RTX Nodes for ComfyUI
extensions.notes: Official Comfy-Org candidate for accelerated image/video workflows. Disabled for the current MacBook-only setup; reconsider only for NVIDIA GPU or cloud GPU runtime.

extensions.name: ComfyUI Manager
extensions.notes: Rejected for production because it can install/remove arbitrary custom nodes. SocialOps uses its own manifest-based extension approval instead.

extensions.name: Comfy Remote Nodes
extensions.notes: Rejected for production until remote-node security boundaries are designed and reviewed.
